title: Building The Dividend Growth Portfolio In 2023
text: My U.S. dividend growth portfolio, constructed in 2015, has outperformed the market by over 2% annually. The portfolio was designed to be resilient in a major stock market correction, focusing on dividend achievers with at least 10 years of dividend growth. For building a similar portfolio in 2023, I considered valuation and growth, leaning towards larger cap or mega-cap stocks, and factored in retirement income needs.
